sections.title: Winter Fiend
sections.notes: Opening fiction about a German soldier's encounter with a Tzimisce during WWII.

sections.notes: The Eldest's nature as a creature of transformation and change.

sections.notes: The Eldest's pact with Kupala, the demon-spirit of the Carpathians.

sections.notes: The Great Flood and Caine's curse that bound the Tzimisce to their native soil.

sections.title: The Eldest Vanishes
sections.notes: The Eldest's fall into torpor and the clan's withdrawal from the world.

sections.notes: The clan's isolation and the drift of individual Tzimisce.

sections.notes: The Eldest's survival through its progeny and the Dracon's role.

sections.notes: The Tzimisce's adaptation to the modern world and their continued evolution.

sections.notes: The Tzimisce's understanding of their condition and their relationship with blood and soil.

sections.notes: The Tzimisce's loyalties and their role within the Sabbat.

sections.notes: The Tzimisce's relationships with other Kindred clans and their views on each.

sections.notes: The Paths of Enlightenment that guide the Tzimisce's spiritual quest for transcendence.
